title: forestiera selleana
intro: Forestiera selleana, also known as Mexican privet, is a shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective against various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Forestiera selleana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. Forestiera selleana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal benefits.
